welcome.subtitle: Welcome to the club! Your go-to place for parenting answers, expert advice, and support.

hospitalBanner.supportMessage: We're here to support you on your parenting journey with exclusive resources tailored for your family.

chatCard.title: Start Chat Genie with Whisperoo
chatCard.description: Genie remembers you and your family's journey so answers are tailored, not generic. Get instant guidance, plus expert recommendations at any hour of the day.

exploreCard.title: Explore Whisperoo Verified Experts
exploreCard.description: Connect with board-certified professionals who specialize in child and family health

preview.title: Has your baby arrived? 🎉
preview.description: Let us know when {{name}} is born so we can update your care plan with postpartum support and reminders.

form.title: Welcome your little one! 🎉
form.invalidDateDescription: Birth date cannot be in the future.
form.successDescription: We've updated your profile. Welcome to the postpartum journey!
form.errorDescription: Could not save birth details. Please try again.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.resetSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link

toast.resetLinkSent: Reset link sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
toast.failedToSendReset: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
toast.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
toast.enterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

createAccount.title: Create Account
createAccount.subtitle: Time is precious so we'll make this quick!
createAccount.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.agreeTermsRequired: You must agree to the terms and conditions

chat.welcomeDesc1: I'm ready to offer guidance, share ideas, and suggest trusted experts who can support you even further. I remember our past conversations to better support you over time. You can access your conversation history using the settings button above, and you'll always have the option to view or delete those notes whenever you like.
chat.welcomeDesc2: Note: Whisperoo’s AI Chat Genie provides general information and support only. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your pediatrician, physician, or other qualified healthcare provider with any questions you may have regarding your child’s health or well-being.
chat.disclaimer: Not medical advice or a substitute for a doctor.
chat.loginRequired: Please log in to access chat support.
chat.errorMessage: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble responding right now. Please try again.

experts.title: Whisperoo Verified Experts
experts.subtitle: Connect with board-certified professionals who specialize in child and family health
experts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, specialty, or expertise...
experts.noExpertsFound: No experts found matching your criteria
experts.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your search or filter options
experts.partOfCareNetwork: This expert is part of your hospital's care network

profile.noProfileDesc: Please log in to view your profile.
profile.languagePreferenceDesc: Whisperoo supports English, Spanish, and Vietnamese. Your selection will be remembered across devices.

settings.noProfileDesc: Please log in to view your settings.
settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your account and chat preferences
settings.chatHistoryDesc: I save lightweight chat summaries, so I remember what matters and you don't have to start over. You can delete individual conversations here.
settings.startChatPrompt: Start a conversation with Whisperoo to see your chat history here.
settings.aboutDesc1: Whisperoo is your AI-powered parenting companion, designed to provide personalized support and guidance for your family journey.
settings.aboutDesc2: Our AI assistant understands your family context and provides tailored advice based on your children's ages, your parenting style, and your specific concerns.
settings.feature2: Child-specific guidance based on age and development
settings.privacyDesc: Your conversations with Whisperoo are private and secure. We never share your personal information or family details with third parties.
settings.deleteDialogDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this chat session? This action cannot be undone.
settings.toastDeletedDesc: The chat session has been permanently removed.
settings.toastErrorDesc: Failed to delete the chat session. Please try again.

language.sectionDescription: Choose your preferred language for the Whisperoo interface.
language.savedToastDescription: Your language preference has been saved.

help.whatIsWhisperooDesc: Whisperoo is your family's trusted companion for navigating the journey of parenting. We provide personalized guidance, expert insights, and 24/7 AI support to help you make informed decisions for your children at every stage of their development.
help.needSupportDesc: Have questions or need assistance? Contact our support team.

role.question: Are you a mom or dad?

kids.question: Are you expecting?
kids.babyNameLabel: Baby's name (or what you're calling them)

toast.dueDateRequiredDesc: Please select your due date to continue.
toast.babyNameRequiredDesc: Please enter your baby's name to continue.

hospitalCheck.question: Are you a patient at a partner hospital?
hospitalCheck.subtitle: If you're affiliated with one of our hospital partners, we can personalize your experience with exclusive resources.

toast.errorDesc: Could not link your hospital. You can update this later in settings.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.subtitle: Welcome to your personalized Whisperoo experience
complete.description: Based on your preferences, we've customized your experience to provide the most relevant support and resources.
